steps.title: Use the scale shortcut: k > 1 makes lengths grow
steps.content:
Side of T = k × side of S. For T's side to be greater than S's side, we need $k > 1$.
Check each choice:
A) $\frac{29}{28} \approx 1.036 > 1$ ✓
B) $1$ — equal, not greater
C) $\frac{28}{29} < 1$ — shrinks
D) $0 < 1$ — collapses to zero
That matches choice A — A is correct.
